ops.note: 2026-07-18: StubDriver dry-run drives the athome loop end-to-end in a tmp repo through the real score_watcher (tests/test_retrain_sweep.py — keeps strict improvements, rejects immutable-boundary edits); unpaid/over-cap calls blocked before spend (SpendCapExceeded, ArmMismatch, UnknownArm, non-finite-cap refusals all fire pre-spend; judge spend flows athome PanelGrant via C3); budget-stop + cache-resume are athome-loop behaviors covered by athome 0.7.x's own suite. Paid path proven live 2026-07-18: 8B baseline sentinel AUC 0.9301 under the $18 pinned cap.
